title: DFA: search-finalize (ladder-beam variable selection)
summary: Sweep feature subsets across k using ladder-beam search with in-sample total log-likelihood as the objective. Writes a top-per-k table and the refitted best-subset coefficients.

title: DFA: search-finalize with bounded k range
summary: Constrain the search to k in [2, 5] and widen the beam. Useful when only a handful of predictors should survive.
oce_text:
[["model-dfa::search-finalize"]]
input = "wide.csv"
run_dir = "./runs"
run_name = "pilot_search_k25"
y_col = "y"
k_min = 2
k_max = 5
beam_width = 50
step_top_n = 20
